claim: This source kit is not a payment integration, merchant backend, ledger, tax engine, PCI boundary, legal retention flow, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Native form, radio fieldset, invoice table, acknowledgement checkbox, and explicit action buttons.
semantics.rolePolicy: Errors are persistent alerts; change impact is optional output; destructive review is inline and never auto-confirms.

keyboard.behavior: Use native radio-group navigation between enabled plans.
Moves through plan, invoice, payment, and cancellation controls in document order.
Activates the focused native or canonical control; cancellation still requires acknowledgement.
Restores the declared plan snapshot when mutable; read-only mode disables and cancels reset without plan callbacks or mutation.

nonColor: Selected plan, invoice status, pending, error, and cancellation states include text, checked state, headings, and native semantics.
responsive: Plan rows collapse intrinsically and the labelled invoice region owns horizontal overflow without widening the page.
consumerResponsibilities: Calculate authoritative prices, taxes, credits, proration, effective dates, invoices, entitlements, and cancellation consequences on secured services.
Use a compliant payment provider and keep card data, provider secrets, and authorization outside this source kit.
Localize currency, dates, legal copy, and spoken labels and complete product security, privacy, legal, financial, browser, and assistive-technology review.
